title: CityClaim
description: The new claim minecraft plugin free ! Create your town/city, claim, custom gui, bank and more !
body:
CityClaim is a Minecraft plugin designed to easily manage and protect cities. It allows players to claim their land and build organized communities with powerful features:

 Claim System – Protect your builds and define plots to prevent griefing or theft.
 Customizable Configuration – Easily configure every aspect of the plugin to fit your server’s needs.
 Custom Menus – Intuitive menus let you manage claims, ranks, permissions, and more.
 Rank-based Permissions – Define and customize ranks such as Officer, Member, and Trusted Member. Each rank can be given precise permissions directly via menus (e.g., allow Trusted Members to open chests but restrict Members).
 City Management – Create, expand, and organize cities with advanced administrative tools.
 City Bank System – Manage a shared city bank through a dedicated menu for easy economy integration.
 Set Home Support – Players can set a home inside their claimed area for quick access.
 
 /c help to start

 CityClaim is the perfect plugin for Minecraft servers looking to create a unique, secure, and fully customizable city experience!
 
 Free plugin !!!
